title: NameIndex Utilization
impact: Eliminate unnecessary graph loads for entity existence checks by using existing O(1) NameIndex

tasks.description: Optimize addTags Entity Existence Check - Replace loadGraph() + find() with getEntityByName() for O(1) entity lookup in EntityManager.addTags()
testCategories: All existing addTags tests must pass
stepByStep: Remove or comment out: const readGraph = await this.storage.loadGraph();
Replace: const entity = readGraph.entities.find(e => e.name === entityName);
Verify rest of method still works (existingTags access, updateEntity call)
tasks.importantNote: The entity from getEntityByName() is the same object reference as in the graph. Reads are valid, but we correctly use updateEntity() for mutations - this is already the case in the current code.
acceptanceCriteria: addTags uses getEntityByName() instead of loadGraph() + find()
No loadGraph() call in addTags method
No changes to method signature or return type

tasks.description: Optimize setImportance Entity Existence Check - Replace loadGraph() + find() with getEntityByName() for O(1) entity lookup in EntityManager.setImportance()
testCategories: All existing setImportance tests must pass
stepByStep: Remove loadGraph() call, use getEntityByName() instead
acceptanceCriteria: setImportance uses getEntityByName() instead of loadGraph() + find()
No changes to method signature or return type

tasks.description: Optimize removeTags Entity Existence Check - Apply the same optimization pattern to EntityManager.removeTags()
testCategories: All existing removeTags tests must pass
stepByStep: Apply same pattern: remove loadGraph(), use getEntityByName()
acceptanceCriteria: removeTags uses getEntityByName() instead of loadGraph() + find()

tasks.description: Run Full Test Suite and Update Metrics - Verify all tests pass and update metrics document with Sprint 3 results
acceptanceCriteria: Improvement factors calculated for addTags, setImportance, removeTags

successCriteria: No unnecessary loadGraph() calls for existence checks
Benchmark shows improvement for entity operations
notes: Can run in parallel with Sprint 2 after Sprint 1 completes. The NameIndex already exists and is maintained by GraphStorage - we're just using it instead of doing redundant O(n) searches. This optimization is especially impactful when called repeatedly (e.g., adding tags to many entities in sequence).
